hero.title: About Waste Management
hero.subtitle: A local, reliable skip hire and waste management company serving London and Surrey.

sections.title: Who We Are
sections.content: Waste Management is a fully licensed waste management company providing skip hire, RoRo containers, caged vans, and comprehensive waste clearance services across South West London, South East London, and Surrey. We are registered with the Environment Agency and committed to responsible waste disposal.

sections.title: Our Mission
sections.content: Our aim is to recycle 100% of the waste we collect. With a zero-to-landfill policy and over 98% of waste currently recycled, we are dedicated to protecting the environment while providing exceptional service to our customers.

sections.title: Why Customers Trust Us
sections.content: For years, homeowners, builders, landscapers, and businesses across London and Surrey have relied on Waste Management for prompt, professional, and competitively priced waste solutions. Our courteous drivers, simple booking process, and expert advice set us apart from the competition.

policies.title: Environmental Policy
policies.content: We are committed to minimising the environmental impact of waste disposal. All waste is sorted and processed at licensed facilities, with materials recycled wherever possible. We maintain a zero-to-landfill policy and continuously improve our recycling rates.

policies.title: Licensing & Compliance
policies.content: Waste Management holds a valid Waste Carriers Licence issued by the Environment Agency. We comply with all UK waste regulations and provide full waste transfer documentation for every collection.
